rationale: In the citing paper, Zervas et al. (2017) appears as part of a grouped background citation supporting a general statement that sharing-economy platforms have challenged established industries. The citation is not given a distinct role in developing the paper's theory, hypotheses, model specification, identification strategy, or empirical interpretation. The core contribution of the citing paper focuses on spatial network effects in platform adoption, and the cited study is not substantively engaged beyond contextual motivation.
